title: Taxonomy Distribution Pie Chart
description: Interactive Chart.js visualization for taxonomy distribution pie chart
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
chart.js
learningObjectives: Interpret a pie chart showing how 200 learning-graph concepts are distributed across eight taxonomy categories from foundational to advanced
Compare each category's actual percentage against its target range, such as 5-10% for foundational concepts
Evaluate taxonomy balance using quality indicators like no single category exceeding 30% of all concepts
Identify the largest and smallest categories, and toggle legend items to isolate categories of interest
